blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 120 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.8" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
